title: Catalog schema is not locally diffable — no surface yields the schema body, only a projection
description: No surface yields the catalog schema body for local diff against an installed schema. read-samples-catalog returns a projection (title, item-shape, relations, invariants, lenses), not the raw JSON Schema (no properties/definitions/$id). The catalog lives under the package at samples/schemas/*.schema.json, i.e. node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context/samples/schemas/ when installed as a dependency.

evidence.reference: buildSampleKind re-projects each schema to title + item-shape; the raw schema body (properties/definitions/$id) is not emitted
resolveCatalog resolves samplesRoot one dir up from the compiled module — node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context/samples/ when installed as a dependency
installedSchemaDestPath writes the installed schema at <substrate>/schemas/<name>.schema.json — the local diff target

impact: To diff an installed schema against the catalog, the operator must open the package's samples/schemas/ inside node_modules; the reflecting CLI exposes no catalog schema body.
proposed_resolution: A fetch op emitting the catalog body (path.join(samplesRoot, kind.schema_path), or the object-store base body via getObject). No sidecar.
